compiled_state.title: Write structural boundary tests for review.huge_diff_file_threshold documentation
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Type
RED (all 4 tests fail before Task 2)

## Description
Create `tests/scripts/test-config-ref-huge-threshold.sh` with 4 structural boundary assertions for CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md and dso-config.example.conf. Use the raw counter pattern from `tests/scripts/test-docs-behavioral-drift-prevention.sh`: `PASS=0`/`FAIL=0`, `echo "PASS: $desc"` / `echo "FAIL: $desc"`, `if [ "$FAIL" -gt 0 ]; then exit 1; fi`.

Tests to write:
- `test_config_ref_has_huge_threshold_section`: `grep -q 'review\.huge_diff_file_threshold' plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md`
- `test_config_ref_huge_threshold_default_20`: `grep -A15 'huge_diff_file_threshold' plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md | grep -q '20'`
- `test_config_ref_huge_threshold_positive_integers`: `grep -A15 'huge_diff_file_threshold' plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md | grep -qi 'positive integer'`
- `test_example_conf_has_huge_threshold_entry`: `grep -q 'huge_diff_file_threshold=20' plugins/dso/docs/dso-config.example.conf`

Also append to `.test-index`:
```
plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md: tests/scripts/test-config-ref-huge-threshold.sh [test_config_ref_has_huge_threshold_section] [test_config_ref_huge_threshold_default_20] [test_config_ref_huge_threshold_positive_integers] [test_example_conf_has_huge_threshold_entry]
```

## TDD Requirement
Entire deliverable is the RED tests. All 4 must fail before Task 2 begins.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Verify: `bash -n tests/scripts/test-config-ref-huge-threshold.sh`
- Verify: `bash tests/scripts/test-config-ref-huge-threshold.sh 2>&1 | grep "^FAIL:.*test_config_ref_has_huge_threshold_section"`
- Verify: `bash tests/scripts/test-config-ref-huge-threshold.sh 2>&1 | grep "^FAIL:.*test_config_ref_huge_threshold_default_20"`
- Verify: `bash tests/scripts/test-config-ref-huge-threshold.sh 2>&1 | grep "^FAIL:.*test_config_ref_huge_threshold_positive_integers"`
- Verify: `bash tests/scripts/test-config-ref-huge-threshold.sh 2>&1 | grep "^FAIL:.*test_example_conf_has_huge_threshold_entry"`
- Verify: `grep -q 'test-config-ref-huge-threshold.sh' .test-index`
